folio.label: 110r
folio.l: To my purpos , Placebo what seye ©e
I seye it is a cursed man , q¶ he
That lettitú Matrimoyne , sekerly
And witú that word , they resyn sodeynly
And ben assentid fully , that he shulde
Be wedded , whan hi~ list , and where he wolde
Heigú fantasie , and curious besynesse
Fro day to day , gan in the soule impresse
Of Ianuarie , a boute his mariage
Many fair shap~ , and many a fair visage
There passetú thurgú his hert , nygút be nygút
As who toke a Myrour , polysshed brygút
And sette it , in a comune , Market place
Than shuld he se , ful many a fygure pace
By his Mirour , and in this same wyse
Gan Ianuarie , witú Inne his æou©t deuyse
Of Maydenes , whicú that dwelt hiö beside
He wyst nougút where , that he mygút a byde
For if that on , haue beaute in hire face
A nother stondetú so , in the peeples grace
For hire sadnes , and hire benignitee
That of the peeple , the grettest voys hatú she
And so~me were riche , and had a bad name
But natheles , betwixt ernest and game
He at the last , a poyntetú hi~ oon one
And lete alle othere , from his hert gone
And chesitú hire , of his owen auctorite
For loue is blynde , al day , and may nat wel wel se
And whan that he was , in his bed brougút
He portrayed in his hert , and in his thougút
¢ Hire Fressú beaute , and hire age tendre
Hire mydel smal , and hire armes sklendre
Hire wys gouänau~ce , hire gentilnesse
Hire wo~manly beryngö , and hire sadnesse
And whan that he , on hire was condescended
Hym thougút his choys , mygút nat ben amended
For whan æat he hiö self , concluded had
Hiö thougút , eche other ma~nys wyt so bad
That inpossible it were , to replie
A geyn his choise , this was his fantasie
Hise frendes sent he to , at his instaunce
And preyed hem , to do hi~ that plesaunce
That hastily they woldyn , to hi~ come
He wold a quyt here labour , al and some
